claim_text: The in-domain DFD, SSFD, utilizes a self-supervised model trained on the fastMRI knee dataset described in 2.1 with a self-supervised in-painting task48 following optimal parameters from a prior transfer learning study for knee cartilage segmentation.49 Image corruptions for the in-painting task were generated dynamically during training by placing zero filled image patches of 16 × 16 pixels on 25% of the image area via Poisson variable density sampling (to ensure nonoverlapping patches), as shown in Figure 1.
